title: How to return to the original, OLD Monday.com view
excerpt: How do I return to the original Monday.com view and stop using the new view feature that just came out? I do not like the new view and it is disrupting my workflow.

posts.author: Clayton (Clayton Coetzee)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I return to the original Monday.com view and stop using the new view feature that just came out? I do not like the new view and it is disrupting my workflow.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @clayton!

You can return to the old board view by going to your avatar in the bottom left corner and then clicking on the monday.labs. In the list that pops up there is a choice that says “Open board experience experiment”. You can then choose to deactivate the feature.

Monday.com does take it’s feedback seriously! I would highly suggest writing them to share your feedback on the new experience!

Hope this helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
